text:
Created attachment 193708
installer stop

Hello, one time I meeted a problem. When I installed on motherboard dx38bt, installer  stop (see attache).I use distributive freebsd-11.00-amd64. If I install version 10.4-amd64-uefi - I didn't see a problem. When I upgrade to 11.00 after reboot system hang (pict. at attach). Could you help install on this motherboard.
